description: A UK-based conglomerate has acquired the company. Localize the HRMS for the new parent company as specified in the transition directive on your Desktop (~/Desktop/uk_transition_directive.txt). Update the Organization Name to 'EcoPower Energy UK', the Organization Code to 'ECO-UK', the Timezone to 'Europe/London', and the Date Format to a standard UK format (Day-first). Create a new location named 'London Global HQ' with City 'London', Country 'United Kingdom', and Timezone 'Europe/London'. Deactivate the legacy 'New York HQ' location.
